svg.text: docs/guide.md:7:1 error A101 image has no alt text
fix: describe the image: ![Bar chart of Q3 sign-ups by region](chart.png)
docs/guide.md:9:1 error A102 alt text "screenshot" is a placeholder, not a description
fix: say what the image shows, not what it is
docs/guide.md:13:13 error A110 link text "click here" does not describe the destination
docs/guide.md:20:1 error A120 heading level jumps from 2 to 4 — skipped level 3
fix: use ### (level 3) so the outline stays navigable
docs/guide.md:22:1 warning A124 bold paragraph "Environment variables" looks like a heading
fix: make it a real heading: ## Environment variables
docs/guide.md:24:11 warning A131 table header row has an unnamed column
fix: give every column a header — screen readers announce it with each cell
